title: Add per-finding description length limits in theme extractor
body:
## Context

From PR #223 code review (fingerprint: `b2f08a8e4115579d1262a1fd2bd8babc`)

## Problem

`buildExtractionPrompt` in `internal/adapter/theme/extractor.go` concatenates finding descriptions directly into the prompt without length limits. A malicious or malformed finding with an extremely long description could exhaust the context window.

## Current Mitigations

- Theme output strings are already limited to 100 characters
- Issue #226 tracks limiting the number of findings processed

## Suggested Improvements

1. Add per-finding description length limit (e.g., 500 chars)
2. Truncate with ellipsis indicator
3. Consider escaping special characters that might break prompt structure

## Priority

Low - defense-in-depth; existing mitigations provide some protection.

## Related

- PR #223: Theme extraction feature
- Issue #226: Findings processing limit
